title: Origin Realms Improved Shader Support
description: A large pack entirely dedicated for the use of shaders on the minecraft server origin realms, with built in emissive, specular, and normal maps.
body:
# The successor of AORE, ORISS comes to Modrinth
Oriss is a resource pack designed in order to making playing the server Origin Realms by Piston Solutions (non-affiliated) a better experience when using shaders, through the use of normal maps, speculars, and emissive textures. This pack is a wip
